name: Phipps Famous Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the all-purpose flour on a cookie sheet and place under a pre-heated broiler about 4-5 inches from the element.
2. Roast the flour, watching it constantly until it is medium brown. Turn with a spatula to brown the other side. The entire procedure takes about three minutes and gives the flour a rich nutty flavor. Let the flour cool.
3. Mix the soft butter with the fruit sugar and add the sifted rice flour.
4. Fold in the roasted flour and blend well. Chop the chocolate into chunks just a little smaller than a sugar cube.
5. Mix them into the dough, taking care not to soften the chocolate too much. Shape as desired.
6. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour. Cool, then store in an airtight container. Yield depends on size and shape.
